name: Four-Cycle Obstruction Witness (associator-generated)
note: Same delta^0, cycle_witness, and target residue as examples/four_cycle.json, but here the residue is not declared directly: it is compiled by associator_residue.py from the seam_instances below via the paper's associator-defect machinery (regional_composition.py), one independent Venn-triple instance per coarse seam.
